title: stelis bogotensis
intro: Stelis bogotensis, also known as the Bogotense Stelis, is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the Stelis genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis bogotensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Stelis bogotensis typically involve drying and powdering the plant's leaves and roots, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or as a topical application.
